branding.title: Brand Images
branding.logoDesc: Shown in the navigation bar and footer. Recommended formats: PNG or PNG.
branding.homeHeaderDesc: Background image for the hero section on the homepage. Use a high-quality horizontal photo (min. 1600px wide).
branding.invalidFormat: Only JPG and PNG images are accepted.

seo.lockedMsg: To customize SEO, contact us at {{email}}.
seo.browserTitleDesc: Text of the browser tab. Key for Google ranking.
seo.globalDescDesc: Define how your real estate agency appears in Google. Summarize who you are and your core value.
seo.propertyDesc: Optimize how this property appears in Google.
seo.googleTitleDesc: If this field is empty, Google will show the main title of the property.
seo.googleDescDesc: This is the summary that appears under the title in Google results. Try not to exceed 155 characters.
seo.placeholderTitle: E.g.: Luxury villa with views in Aracena | Zendo
seo.placeholderDesc: The system will use an automatic summary if you leave this empty.

legal.templateLibrarySubtitle: Drafted for the real estate sector
legal.autoSmartNote: If you have Google Analytics or the Meta Pixel configured in Settings, third-party clauses will be automatically inserted when applying the Cookies template from the Library.
legal.footerPreviewDesc: Simulation of your real estate agency's footer
legal.technicalRoutesDesc: All legal links point to the public route

enLocked.planMsg: Multi-language editing in English is available from the Business plan or higher.

cookiesAlert.label: Zendo Tip
cookiesAlert.msg: If you enable Google Analytics or Meta Pixel in your Settings, your template will automatically include the mandatory third-party clauses when applying the template from the Library.

successBanner.title: Legal texts synced successfully!
successBanner.desc: Changes are now published on your real estate website.

dbWarningBanner.title: Database migration required!
dbWarningBanner.desc: The legal_translations column does not exist yet. Please run the corresponding database migration in Supabase.

disclaimer.title: ⚠️ Zendo Liability Disclaimer Notice
disclaimer.body: The templates provided by the platform are standard models of a purely informational nature. Zendo does not provide legal advice and is not responsible for the accuracy, adequacy, or validity of the texts. It is the sole responsibility of the agency to ensure compliance with applicable regulations (GDPR/local data protection law).

cookiesLocked.title: 🔒 Zendo Technical Cookies (Read-Only) [Protected System]
cookiesLocked.body: This platform uses essential technical cookies to maintain the session and ensure security. These cookies do not collect private data and are mandatory.
cookiesLocked.thirdPartyPlaceholder: Add your marketing cookies here (Google Analytics, Pixel, etc.) under your own responsibility.

legal.gaClause:
Google Analytics Cookies

This website uses Google Analytics, a web analytics service provided by Google LLC. Google Analytics uses cookies to help analyze how users use the website.
legal.metaPixelClause:
Meta Pixel (Facebook) Cookies

This website uses the Meta Pixel, an analytics tool that allows us to measure the effectiveness of our advertising.
legal.unsavedChangesWarning: You have unsaved changes in this legal session that will be completely lost if you exit the CRM or switch sections. Are you sure you want to leave without saving?

publishModal.title: ⚠️ Legal Publication Confirmation and Liability Assumption
publishModal.body: You are about to sync and publish these texts on your public website. By confirming this action, you explicitly declare and agree that:
publishModal.point1: You have reviewed, completed, and personally adapted these texts to the actual activity of your business.
publishModal.point2: You fully release Zendo from any civil, legal, or administrative liability arising from the content published by your agency.
publishModal.checkboxLabel: I understand and accept these sole responsibility terms.
